title: Click Event
description: Occurs when a control is clicked.
notes: The Click event is used to respond to a click on a control by the user. You can use the Sender$ parameter to determine which control sent the event. This is useful when you want to use one function to handle more than one control, such as for radio buttons and check boxes.
see_also:
Applies To

Button, Label, RadioButton, Checkbox, ListBox, ComboBox, PictureBox, GroupBox, VideoBox, ProgressBar, StatusBar, Grid

Load Event

GUI Items: Click Event

Button, Label, TextBox, RadioButton, CheckBox, ListBox, ComboBox, PictureBox, GroupBox
examples:
Function frmMain_btnStart_Click(Sender$ As String )
    Xqt main
Fend
